text: Standing here in the dimly lit corridor, I feel a sense of isolation and anticipation. The harsh glare of an emergency light contrasts against the darkness, reminding me of the fragility of comfort and certainty. Moving into the next room, the obscure outlines of 'R+D' on the wall speak to human curiosity and progress, yet the shadows lend an air of unfinished thought—a quiet, almost metaphysical reminder that all knowledge is a work in progress. I am both uneasy and contemplative, aware of my own smallness within this silent, institutional expanse.
